description_long: This is a classic, upright fire hydrant with a cylindrical body and a domed top, painted in a deep, weathered red color. The hydrant features three prominent hose connection outlets: two on the sides and one facing forward, each with a bolted cap. The top of the hydrant has a central operating nut, surrounded by a series of bolts securing the dome. The base is flanged and bolted, suggesting it is designed to be anchored securely to the ground. The surface shows signs of wear, with some chipping and darkened areas, indicating exposure to outdoor urban environments. No chains are visible on the caps, and there are no discernible manufacturer markings.
description: A weathered red fire hydrant with three hose outlets, bolted caps, and a domed top, showing signs of outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main hose outlet and cap, with bolts and the operating nut on top clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one of the lateral hose outlets and the cylindrical body, with the top nut and bolts in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back hose outlet and the symmetrical arrangement of bolts and caps.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other lateral hose outlet and the domed top, with the main outlet partially visible.
